title: Contrastive Summarization with Multiple Perspectives
scenario: Develop a prompt that will produce a contrastive summary of two opposing viewpoints, highlighting the key differences and similarities in their arguments. The LLM output should be a text summary, 200-250 words in length, that objectively presents both sides and identifies areas of agreement and disagreement.
constraints: Must include a clear separation of the two viewpoints
Must use neutral language and avoid bias towards either perspective

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluates the effectiveness of the contrastive summary in highlighting key differences and similarities between the two viewpoints
Checks if the prompt maintains a neutral tone and avoids bias towards either perspective
Assesses the quality and informativeness of the summary, including the accuracy of the presented information
Ensures the summary adheres to the target length and is not excessively long or short
